yoruba: Ń sọ ní pàtó oye ìdádúró ọ̀kẹ́-ìṣísẹ̀ lẹ́yìn tí atọ́ka náà ti wọ agbègbè náà kí pánẹ́ẹ̀lì tó dá farahàn. Ìgbà tí bọ́tìnì ìpamọ́_aládàáṣe bá jẹ́ òótọ́ nìkan ni bọ́tìnì yìí wúlò.
english: Specifies the number of milliseconds delay after the pointer enters the panel area before the panel is automatically re-shown. This key is only relevant if the auto_hide key is true.

yoruba: Tẹ̀ láti wo àwọn àdéhùn-ìpàdé àti àwọn iṣẹ́ rẹ
english: Click to view your appointments and tasks

yoruba: Sún láàrin àwọn fèrèsé ṣíṣí nípa lílo àwọn bọ́tìnì
english: Switch between open windows using buttons

yoruba: Àwọn ààtò àti àwọn ìkúndùn aládàáni

Tó bá jẹ́ òótọ́, "Àwọn Ìṣàmúlò-ètò Mímọ̀" tía tòjọ nínú onísọ̀rọ̀gbèsì "Rọ́ọ̀nù Ìsàmúlò-ètò"wà nílẹ̀. Bóyá a fẹ ìṣàtòjọ náà tàbí a kò fẹ̀ẹ́, nígbà tí onísọ̀rọ̀gbèsì náà bá ti farahàn bọ́tìnì àtòjọ_àtòjọ-ètò_ìfihàn ló ń darí rẹ̀.
english: If true, the "Known Applications" listing in the "Run Application" dialog is made available. Whether or not the listing is expanded when the dialog is shown is controlled by the show_program_list key.

yoruba: Lọ sí ojú-ìwé tókàn tí a óò bẹ̀ wò

english: could not get information about output %d

yoruba: Àwọn ààtò àti àwọn ìkúndùn aládàáni
Gbé àwọn fèrèsé lọ sí ààyè-iṣẹ́ lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́ tí a kò bá fẹ̀ẹ́lójú mọ́
english: Move windows to current workspace when unminimized

yoruba: Atọ́nà àkójọpọ̀-ìròyìn tí a óó lò nínú àpẹẹrẹ aládàáni
english: Profile directory to use in the private instance
